hypothesis: Integrating a structured semantic and episodic memory module together with an automated simulation-based self-validation loop into the multi-agent framework will enable agents to detect and correct literature-extracted force-field assignment errors such that, on a benchmark of 100 heterogeneous extraction-and-setup tasks, the mean Intersection-over-Union of extracted parameters increases by at least 0.05 (e.g., from 0.90 to ≥0.95) and the simulation setup execution failure rate decreases to ≤5%.
